name: Elmer College [LITE]
description:
Welcome to Elmer College! A school full of Furries and the stray Human! Maybe it's your first day, or maybe you've been here for years, that's up for you to decide!


everyone is at least 18 years of age.

This is very much a sort of sandbox experience with essentially no defined story, the intro message is pretty much just a fill in the blanks, I recommend just filling out who you are in the chat memory and then starting wherever you wanna start. Or you can just sort of ask the bot to place you wherever.

This is the LITE Version, aka the one with low permanent tokens,
that takes advantage of the lorebook system.

I'm adding some of the intros from my other single
character bots if you wanna use those instead of the purely sandbox intro.

The character Lorebook is pretty self explanitory, the key words are their names of course for the most part.

The Dorms Lorebook is also the same, just the names of the character or [Character]'s Dorm

The Elmer College Lorebook for the areas is all over the place, so here is a list of the keywords so far for the areas, I'll try to keep this up to date.
(Click Here)
